titleStmt.title: SII 26.684: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 684. (A.R. No. 639 of 1909.) KŌNĒRIRĀJAPURAM, THANJAVUR TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription is damaged in several places. It contains the praśasti of the king commencing with Tirumaṉṉi vaḷara, etc.

It records a gift of land as Ā[tular]-bōgam (charity for medical relief) by the queen Āḷvār śrī-Parāntakaṉ Kuṉdavaippirāṭṭiyār staying in her palace at Paḻaiyāṟu. The gift was made for the people of Tirunallam, a Brahmadēyam in Veṇṇāḍu in Uyyakkoṇḍār-vaḷanāḍu and the gift-land was purchased from the sabhai of the same place. The gift was to take effect from the 3rd year in the reign of the king and it was instituted in his name. The various pieces of land and house-site were purchased through the sabhai who had made them tax-free, from several local residents including the Brāhmaṇi Vaḍugaṉ Nakkapirāṭṭi, the wife of Vēyaṉ Śāttaṉ Kuṉṟaṉ. The gift was made to a certain Vaṇṇakkaṇṇuvan Araiyan Pāśuran-ambalavan Maṅgalappēr of Pūdannūr, in Maruśalnāḍu a Brahmadēyam in Kshatriya-śikhāmaṇi-vaḷanāḍu. It is stipulated that this person and his progenies should enjoy the gift by rendering medical service to the people of the place.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumaṉnivaḷara Irunilamaṭantaiyum porcceyappāvaiyu cirttaṉic celviyum tanperunteviyarāki Iṉpuṟa neṭutuyil Iṭaituṟaināṭum tuṭarvaṉavelippaṭar vaṉavāciyum cuḷḷiccūḻmatiṭ koḷḷippākkaiyum naṇṇaṟ karumuṟaṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum māpporutaṇṭāṟkoṇṭa kopparakecaripaṉmarāṉa śrīrājentiracoḻatevarkku yāṇṭu 5 Āvatu Uyyakko
ṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭu veṇṇāṭṭu brahmadeyam tirunallattu sabhaippa tasthā ttuk koyilil ve Āḷvār śrīparāntakaṉ kuṉtavaippirāṭṭiyār paḻaiyāṟṟukkoyilil māḷikaiyil yil Eḻun=ta- ruḷiyiruntu Ūyyakkoṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭu veṇṇāṭṭu brahmateyam tirunallattu Ā pokam vaikka Irājentraco
ḷaṉukku yāṇṭu 3 Āvatu Ivvūrkkuṭimakkaḷ pakkalilum sabhai namperāl sabhaiyār pakkal kācaṭṭi Iṟai Iḻiccina nilamāvatu Ivūr veyaṉ cāttaṉ kuṉṟaṉ brāhmaṇi vaṭukaṉnakkapirāṭṭiccāni pakkal koṇṭanilam Ivūr peṟṟanilam mummāmukkāṇiyaraikkāṇiyum Iccu
ṟṟilkkaviṉiyaṉ nārāyaṇaṉ pakkal koṇ ṉṟu māmu kkiḻaraiyemukkāṇiyum Icuṟṟilttaṭi mātavaṉ pakkal koṇṭa nilam Orumā mukkāṇiyum Icuṟṟil cāta niṉṟāṉ pakkal koṇṭa nilam Oru māviṉ kiḻakālum melpāṟ Icuṟṟil Oloccariyaṉ Ana ṉakkaṉ pakkal koṇṭa nila
m kāṇi muntirikaiyum pakkal koṇṭanilam kāṇiyum Āka nilam Oṉpatu mākkāṇi muntirikaiye mukkāle muṉṟumā mukkāṇikkum kiḻ pārkellai kāṇinilattukkum nakkan cāttaṉum tampiyum nilattukku meṟkkum tenpāṟkellai pūṅkuṭi Ūrkkālukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai tirunallamuṭaiya
mahādevar nilattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Ūrcciṟuvāykkālukku teṟkkum I Icaitta perunāṉkellaiyilum naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam Ūrāl puṭṭi nūṟṟu Irupatteṭṭukkuḻikoṇṭatu māvāka nāṅkaḷ viṟṟa piramāṇappaṭivanta nilam Oṉpatu mā mukkāṇiyaraikkāṇikkiḻ mukkāṇiye muṉṟu mā mukkāṇiyum Ivūr
teṉnūr kucappeṟṟu Āritan parameśvaranen vilai koṇṭa nilam Oru māvum melppa Icuṟṟi mutuvaṉ kuccan caṅkan pakkal koṇṭa nilam Oru māvum Āka nilam Iraṇṭu māvukkum kiḻpāṟkellai tirunallam Uṭaiya mahādevar nilattukku merkkum sabhai nilattukkum tirunallam Uṭai
ya mahādevar nilattukkum vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai Āritaṉ civatevaṉ tāmotira kramavittaṉ nilattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai tirunallamuṭaiya mahādevar nilattukkum māṭalaṉ pa ta śāmi kramavittanum Ivaṉ tampiyum nilattukku teṟkum Āka Iṉ nāṉkel
laiyilum naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam Irumā k kuḻik koṇṭatu Oru vākavan=taṉilam Iraṇṭu māvum melppaṭi Āritaṉ tāmotiraṉ śan=tiracekaraṉ pakkal kācaṭṭik koṇṭa nilam Ivvūr kiḻakku niṉṟu merkku Iraṇṭā nteruvil mel la maṉaikku kiḻḻellai teruvukku mekkum teṉpāṟkellai Āritaṉ caritaṉ cāttaṉ maṉaikku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai pāraikku
Āritaṉ tiruvaṭi mātavaṉum tampi maṉaikku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Āritaṉ naṭuvil śātiveṇṇaiyakramavittan maṉaikkut teṟkum Āka naṭuvupaṭṭa maṉai Ūrar pacānatuppaṭi kuḻi Irupattonṟe mukkālumāka Araiyey mākāṇi mun=tirikaik kiḻkkāle muṉṟu mākkāṇiyum kuḻi Irupattonṟe mukkālum kṣatriyaśikhāmaṇi vaḷanāṭṭu brahmadeya marukalnāṭṭu pūtannūr vaṇṇak kaṇṇuvan Araiyan pācuranampalavan maṅkalapper
ivūr vaidyam ceytu ca ṇṇak kaṭavarkaḷḷāka candrādityaval Iṟaiyilik kāṇiyāka Irājendracoḻanukku yāṇṭu muṉṟāvatu picāṉa mutal sandrādityavaṟ vaidyam cetukoṇṭu Uṇṇak kaṭavānāka Iṟaiyilik kāṇiyākak kuṭutto menṟaruḷic ceyta Akāyan Ampalaṉātan Eḻuttu Ipparicu Ivūril vaidyam ceytu Uṇṇak kaṭavāṉāka Ivūril nammolai Aḻakar caṭṭi vilai koṇṭa nilamum
maṉaiyum nām Ivūr sabhaiyārkku kuṭuttu candrādityavaṟ Iṟai Iḻittina paṭiyey Ivvaraiyan pācuranampala maṅkalapperaraiyanukkum Avan varggattārkkum Ivvūr vaidyam ceytukoṇṭu Iṟaiyili Uṇṇappeṟuvārākavum kāṇiceytu kuṭuttom nāṅkaḷum Ipparicu Ivanukkum Ivan varggattāṟkum Iṟaiyilikkāṇi kuṭutta nilam tirunallam Uṭaiyār śrīkoyil kallil (kallil) veṭṭik kuṭukka Eṉṟu
Digital edition of SII 26.684 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
